# .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE

GitHub issue form templates. `config.yml` disables blank issues and provides a direct email link for private disclosures.

| Template | Labels | Use for |
|---|---|---|
| `bug_report.yml` | `bug`, `needs triage` | Unexpected crashes, incorrect behavior, regressions |
| `feature_request.yml` | `enhancement`, `needs triage` | New feature proposals or UX improvements |
| `question.yml` | `question` | Usage or contribution questions |
| `task.yml` | `task` | Internal engineering work: refactors, tech debt, infrastructure |
